publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-05-23 18:31:48 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Slides, photographs, and papers concering Matyas' career in facilities at Cornell, including his work on the Superconducting Super Collider, the Laboratory of Nuclear Studies, the Wilson Synchrotron Laboratory, Arecibo Ionospheric Observatory, and various other campus buildings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Peter Martinez, Sept. 2004 Julia Parker, Oct. 2009

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Robert Matyas papers, #43-01-3368. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Vice President for Facilities and Business Operations, Cornell University. Cornell University Class of 1951, Robert Matyas received a degree in architecture in 1952.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Slides, photographs, and papers concerning Matyas' career in facilities at Cornell, including his work on the Superconducting Super Collider, the Laboratory of Nuclear Studies, the Wilson Synchrotron Laboratory, Arecibo Ionospheric Observatory, Snee Hall (Geology), the Johnson Art Museum, and various other campus buildings. Also, Day Hall space planning documents, 1969-1972 and a report of the "Status of Old Country Club Land in Cayuga Heights," compiled by Thomas Mackesey, 1974. Includes programs for dedications of various campus buildings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, Arecibo photographs by Dale Corson, photographs of Jason Seley sculptures, photographs of the Uris Library addition, other Arecibo and campus scenes, including glass negatives of the Arts Quad.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, "Living units for men, Cornell University," 1951, architecture student project report about dormitories at Cornell, by Robert D. Katz, Robert M. Matyas, John I. Williams, and Carlton S. Young.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: "Some Things I Remember about the Anabel Taylor Interfaith Chapel at Cornell University," 2012

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.library.cornell.edu/handle/1813/40538

controlaccess.subject: Dormitories -- Designs and plans.
Superconducting Super Collider.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Laboratory of Nuclear Studies
Cornell University. College of Architecture, Art, and Planning

did.unittitle: Performing Arts Center at SUNY Purchase Campus Slides
MS & O, CHP, and CWP Slides
Cornell University Heating Plant Aerial Photos
Assorted Cornell University Photos, Sapsucker Woods, Ithaca College
Arecibo Photos, A Time of Wonder: The Arecibo Telescope 1974

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Harry Burgess, Wisconsin Trip, Tunnel, Isle of Shoals (1980), Commencement (1981), Manchester, NH (1981), Cape Cod (1981), Performing Arts Center, Observatory, Bill Hamilton, Arecibo Main Cable Inspection, Cornell Club in NYC, Toronto, Cornell University Medical College, Cornell University Heating Plant, Ithaca Gun, Cornell University Football, World Trade Center (Feb. 1987), New York City, California (1987), Chicago, Atlanta (Feb. 1987), Baker Laboratory, Washington, DC, Uris Library Addition, Cornell University Construction, Mining, Massachusetts Avenue House in Washington, DC, Geology Building Construction, Sab Micron Lab, Day Hall, VCAT, Sibley Hall, Mrs. Robert Purcell, St. Lawrence River, Pew Quad Dedication (1980), Cornell University Career Center, Statler West, Risley Hall, East Avenue, Nick Noyes, Indianapolis, Boston, assorted Cornell University views, assorted Arecibo views, and miscellaneous shots as well as slides of the following: New York City, Cornell University Construction, Performing Arts Center, Statler, Cornell University Medical College, Olin Library Construction, Uris Library, assorted Cornell University views, assorted Arecibo views, and assorted Ithaca views
